name: Evan
cooked: Another thought occurred to me overnight. If you host the non-standard fanout transaction somewhere your miners can access them, probably via an API, the miners can simply attach their own fee to the 0-sat anchor and broadcast it to the mempool. Once the fee is attached the pair is now a standard 1p1c package that can be relayed across the node network.
topic_title: Fee Selection for CTV-Based Mining Pool Fanouts
topic_html_title: Fee Selection for CTV-Based Mining Pool Fanouts
